retrieval_method: GitHub connector (direct archive download unavailable in runtime)
important_upstream_observations: Graph code already supports specialized KV cache implementations.
llm_fused_op already contains LIGHTNING_INDEXER, providing a precedent for a retrieval/index fused operation.
llama_kv_cache exposes get_k_storage(layer), get_k/get_v views, and input/mask construction APIs.
The current integration should be implemented as an optional memory/index component, not as a replacement for the core cache.
